calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Strike Costs
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO STRIKE COSTS
is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Reginald Schubert; Adams Stirling PLC; 800-464-2817; appearing via CourtCall on behalf of defendant Hill Investment Company.

No other appearances.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is DENIED. Moving party failed to show probability of prevailing on the merits or irreparable harm.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
